meaning: vt.改头换面地重复n.旧调重弹的作品
examples: The movie is just a rehash of the best TV episodes.
The critic found the play "a feeble rehash of familiar Miller themes."
I'm not going to rehash all that here.
That seems like as good an opportunity as any to rehash my own views on the matter.
For the Moxley family, the court proceedings were a rehash of old and hurtful information, Mr. Moxley said.
